package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_index_any_not_minus_one_contains_any: `bytes.IndexAny(...) != -1` presence checks instead of `bytes.ContainsAny(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario453Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
